name: apexvip-web
description: ApexVIP web frontend — TypeScript + Vite. Typed callable client over the shared functions contract; the migration on-ramp for the single-file HTML apps.

scripts.test: node --test --experimental-strip-types src/concierge/intent.test.ts src/payments/pricing.test.ts src/payments/checkout.test.ts src/payouts/ledger.test.ts src/payouts/onboarding.test.ts src/referrals/referrals.test.ts src/trips/rating.test.ts src/trips/chat.test.ts src/trips/flight.test.ts src/membership/membership.test.ts src/security/escape.test.ts src/payments/booking.test.ts src/driver/earnings.test.ts src/telemetry/errors.test.ts src/concierge/context.test.ts
